description_long: This is a two-story bungalow with a white exterior, black gabled roof, and a large wraparound deck bordered by lush palm trees. The front features a double garage, two prominent windows, and a paved driveway leading to the entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a built-in fireplace or grill area. Multiple sets of windows and French doors provide ample natural light and access to the deck. The architectural style blends modern and tropical elements, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living. The overall structure is substantial, with a solid concrete or masonry base and wooden or composite deck materials.
description: A modern two-story white bungalow with a black gabled roof, large wraparound deck, palm trees, and a pool. Features include a double garage, multiple windows, and extensive outdoor living space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, two large front windows, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the chimney, and the expansive deck with palm trees and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and multiple French doors opening to the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, side windows, and the continuation of the deck and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped rear French doors
